# CoReason VS Code Projection Manifold

> "This repository is a cybernetic control surface and topological canvas for the coreason-runtime Active Inference mesh."

## IPC Network Contract
The exact `WebviewMessage` payloads:
- [`READY`](./src/shared/types.ts): Triggers the React mount handshake.
- [`SCHEMA_UPDATE`](./src/shared/types.ts): Update the schema structure stored in the Host.
- [`SET_ROUTE`](./src/shared/types.ts): Request to change the current application route.
- [`SET_ORACLE_WORKFLOW`](./src/shared/types.ts): Request to set the Oracle workflow context.
- [`EDGE_CREATED`](./src/shared/types.ts): Notify React that a new edge has been created.
- [`REQUEST_SYNTHESIS`](./src/shared/types.ts): Request data synthesis from the Python edge.

The exact `ExtensionMessage` payloads:
- [`REQUEST_SCHEMA`](./src/shared/types.ts): Request the current schema state from React.
- [`OPEN_FILE`](./src/shared/types.ts): Notify React to display a newly opened file.
- [`YAML_UPDATE`](./src/shared/types.ts): Broadcast an update to the underlying YAML data.

## The Telemetry Mesh
Real-time LLM thoughts are streamed via Server-Sent Events (SSE) from `http://localhost:8000/api/v1/telemetry/stream`.
Expected event types:
- `NodeStartedEvent`
- `TokenStreamChunk`
- `NodeCompletedEvent`
- `NodeErrorEvent`

## The AST Mutation Protocol
Bi-directional YAML Lens mutations (e.g., adding an edge) must be performed via `vscode.WorkspaceEdit().insert()` or `replace()`, appending new connections rather than string-replacing the entire AST. Visual edges map to `actionSpaceCId` arrays in the AST.
